title: Solving Quadratic Equations with the Quadratic Formula

blocks.body: The Quadratic Formula: for ax^2 + bx + c = 0, x = (-b +/- sqrt(b^2 - 4ac)) / 2a. This formula works for ANY quadratic equation, always.
Memorize the quadratic formula: "negative b, plus or minus square root of b squared minus 4ac, all over 2a." It is one of the most important formulas in algebra.
